title: The Outcasts of Poker Flat
writer: Bret Harte, John Twist, Harry Segall
actors: Preston Foster, Jean Muir, Van Heflin
plot: A California mining camp is plagued by a series of murders. Four people come under suspicion for the killings and are swiftly run straight out of the camp. During a blizzard they take refuge in an isolated cabin, and conflicts bre...
